programmes.show_description: (2008) Gutsy western starring Lou Diamond Phillips. A decorated soldier returning home after the American Civil War finds that an evil land owner has taken over the town.

programmes.show_description: With access to the UK's Maritime Coastguard Agency and Mountain Rescue Teams, follow the extraordinary men and women who put their own lives at risk to save members of the public 24/7.

(2021) Tense psychological thriller with Annika Foster. A woman falls for a handsome firefighter who saves her life, but soon discovers that his overprotective nature can get obsessive - and deadly.

(2012) Thriller with Rhona Mitra. Still haunted by a failed negotiation, a psychologist is thrust back into high-stakes action when her sister is taken hostage, forcing her to face her greatest fears.
(2019) Tense thriller starring Kristina Klebe. A recently widowed woman grows suspicious of her insular son's new friend. Could his seemingly strange obsession with her turn sinister?
(2018) Tense thriller starring Rosslyn Luke. Happy to be reunited at first, a woman quickly realises her former best friend has sinister plans to hold her and her family hostage.
(2019) Cradle-robbing thriller with Clare Kramer. Jessica is shocked when her daughter starts dating an older man. But that soon turns to terror when she discovers her lethal connection to him...

(2020) Twist-laden thriller with Karynn Moore. When her wealthy estranged sister dies, Carly is shocked to be named guardian of her daughter. But someone's plans didn't include a long-lost relative...
(2020) Thriller starring Lindsay Hartley. Two families are thrown into crisis when they discover their daughters were switched at birth - but nothing will stop one mother keeping what's hers...
The infamous British spy Harry Palmer is brought out of retirement to trace a stolen vial of a deadly virulent virus.  Stars Michael Caine and Jason Connery (1995).
A CIA agent has to stop Islamic terrorists from teaming up with Mexican cartels to smuggle weapons of mass destruction into the U.S.
(2017) Action-packed western with Bill Pullman, Peter Fonda and Jim Caviezel. Loyalty and friendship are tested when an ageing gunslinger sets out to avenge his murdered friend.
(1963) Western starring John Wayne, Maureen O'Hara and Patrick Wayne. A wealthy rancher must navigate warring factions in the Wild West while also fighting to save his troubled marriage.

(2018) Drama thriller starring Chelsea Hobbs. Crime fiction becomes a horrifying reality when a novelist's daughter is abducted in a copycat scenario taken straight from her latest book.
(2022) Thriller with Brooke Burfitt. A pregnant woman hires a doula to help with her home birth. But as delivery day approaches and shocking secrets emerge, who can she really trust?

(2018) High-stakes thriller with Kelly Sullivan. Melissa encounters the in-law from hell when her husband's long-lost mother returns. As she unleashes a twisted plan, someone is not needed any more...

(2017) Thriller with Jamie Luner. Tess is finally ready to live again after her son's death years before. But a brief romance with a handsome soldier is about to twist from attraction into obsession..

(2020) Suspenseful thriller starring Andrea Bogart. When her daughter is abducted, Shannon decides to take matters into her own hands, putting her on a collision course with a deadly kidnapper...
(2017) True crime story with Larry Lamb. A group of old-time criminals attempt to pull off the biggest heist in British history. Also starring Joely Richardson and Phil Daniels.
(2015) Thriller starring Jordan Hinson. After her father is laid off, a passionate college student joins activists to stop a corporation from ruining more lives.
